turns.speaker: Maya
turns.text: Hi Sam, I hope you're doing well. Could I possibly ask a small favor, if it's not too much trouble?

turns.speaker: Sam
turns.text: Hi Maya! Absolutely, what do you need?

turns.speaker: Maya
turns.text: Would you be willing to look over my cover letter? Only if you have the time — no pressure at all.

turns.speaker: Sam
turns.text: I'd be glad to. Send it over whenever you're ready.
